# Code Quality Standards

## Testing

- All code must have a minimum of 80% test coverage
- Unit tests are mandatory for all business logic
- Integration tests are required for all API endpoints

## Code Review

- All changes require at least one peer review
- Reviews must verify adherence to coding standards
- Automated linting must pass before review

## Documentation

- All public APIs must have documentation
- Architecture decisions must be recorded as ADRs
- README files must be kept up to date
